name: The $2 Little Meal, Caramelized Onions and Pa
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Dried basil leaves (or 3 tbsp fresh torn in small pieces)
1/2 tsp Dried thyme leaves (or 3 tbsp fresh)
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------
1. In a large nonstick skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat.
Add sliced onions and cook until they begin to brown, about 10 minutes.
2. If the onions start to burn slightly, that's okay.
3. Lower the heat and add salt, sugar, dried basil, thyme (or their fresh equivalents), and black pepper.
Cook for 10 minutes, stirring often, until the onions are uniformly caramel-colored.
4. Add water and vinegar, then cover.
Simmer while the pasta is cooking.
5. Meanwhile, bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook the pasta al dente. Drain well.
6. Divide the cooked pasta into four bowls.
7. Top each serving with an equal portion of caramelized onions and sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese if desired.
